data.body: NOTE (SKILL rewrite 2026-04-23): architect-foundation SKILL.md was restructured. The former 'Phase 3: The Enforcer (Deterministic Guardrails) / Step 1: Enforcement Layer Architecture' is now 'Phase 3 Step 3 — Generate fitness functions and enforcement files'. Stack-specific scaffolding templates live in plugins/dso/skills/architect-foundation/fitness-function-templates.md (loaded on demand in P3 Step 3). Wiring/registration of the scaffolded checks belongs in the new P4 Step 1 Wiring Checklist. Anti-pattern codes AP-1..AP-5 are defined in plugins/dso/skills/shared/prompts/anti-patterns.md. Work remains STRETCH and epic-non-blocking per original scope.
